title: Extraction and isolation of lignin derivatives from roots of Argemone mexicana L
author: D. T. Tayade
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Mahatma Fule Arts, Commerce and S.C. Science Mahavidhyalaya, Warud-444 906, Dt. Amravati, Maharashtra 

 Jijamata Science College, Buldana, Maharashtra, India 

  Manuscript received 28 July 2004, revised 14 November 2005, accepted 2 December 2005  

 Extradion, isolation and characterization of five ligands from roots of Argemone mexicana have been described in this communication.
